original_image_tags: A black-and-white infrared sensor still, appearing to be from a Forward-Looking Infrared (FLIR) or similar targeting system. The image has a grainy, noisy texture with a uniform grey background. A white crosshair reticle with numbered "3" marks on the horizontal axis is centered in the frame. A small, dark, oblong or pill-shaped object is visible just to the right of the crosshair's vertical line, resting on the horizontal axis.

elements.description: A grainy, low-resolution photograph featuring a central white crosshair with the number '3' visible on the horizontal line. One small, blurry, dark, elongated object is visible just right of the center. The image contains multiple solid black rectangular redaction blocks obscuring parts of the frame, and a timestamp '12/31/99 18:19:33' is visible at the bottom left.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements: a grainy, low-resolution image with a central white crosshair, the number '3' on the horizontal line, and a single small, dark, elongated object to the right of the center.
